zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Vautort於大約1270年出生在英國時，他的父親John de Valletort31歲，母親Mary de Columbiéres26歲。他於大約1288年與Lucy Brett在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年2月10日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Vautort于大约1270年出生在英国时，他的父亲John de Valletort31岁，母亲Mary de Columbiéres26岁。他于大约1288年与Lucy Brett在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1310年2月10日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Vautort was born about 1270, in England, his father, John de Valletort, was 31 and his mother, Mary de Columbiéres, was 26. He married Lucy Brett about 1288, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 10 February 1310, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Vautort est né environ 1270, à Angleterre, son père, John de Valletort, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary de Columbiéres, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Brett environ 1288, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé après 10 février 1310, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Vautort um 1270 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Valletort 31 und seine Mutter Mary de Columbiéres 26. Er hat um 1288 in England Lucy Brett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb nach 10. Februar 1310 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Vautort è nato il circa 1270 nel England, il suo padre, John de Valletort, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Columbiéres, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Brett circa 1288, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 10 febbraio 1310, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Vautortが約1270年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Valletortは31歳，母Mary de Columbiéresは26歳であった。約1288年にイギリスでLucy Brettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年2月10日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Vautort(이)가 대략 1270년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Valletort(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Columbiéres(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 영국에서 Lucy Brett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 2월 10일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Vautort nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Valletort, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Columbiéres, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Brett aproximadamente 1288, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu após 10 de fevereiro de 1310, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Vautort родился около 1270 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John de Valletort было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary de Columbiéres, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Brett около 1288 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер после 10 февраль 1310 г. в его родном городе.
